incidentSummary: Business request completed, but distributed trace graph was fragmented between services.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: trace headers were intentionally dropped on call from orders-service to payments-service
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Orders logs indicate trace propagation break mode; Tempo shows orphan payments span with no parent despite matching time and correlation context.

performanceFindings: No major latency regression observed; impact is observability quality and slower incident investigation.
recommendedActions: Add propagation continuity check in CI by asserting parent-child span linkage.
